judge_result.short_rationale: Fresh air first is correct, and poison control/doctor plus emergency escalation are included. However, the source orders 911/ambulance for not breathing before poison control/doctor; the answer places poison control second and only later mentions emergency escalation, weakening priority. It also changes the escalation condition from specifically not breathing to broader breathing trouble/stopped breathing.
